title: Polymath Runbook frontmatter
description: Validates the YAML frontmatter of a docs/runbooks/<slug>.md authored by polymath-writing:runbook. The `last_reviewed` field is load-bearing: a runbook whose review date is older than 6 months is treated as stale by the catalog's freshness check. The skill insists every step has an expected outcome and a non-empty rollback in the body; the schema enforces frontmatter discipline.

owner.description: Owning team or rotation — never a single person (the skill enforces). Pattern allows team handles or rotation names.

last_reviewed.description: ISO-8601 date the runbook was last reviewed by its owner. Staleness checks compare this against today.

severity_for.description: Severity levels this runbook is authoritative for.

alert.description: Optional alert / signal that triggers this runbook (e.g. monitor name, Datadog query, alert ID).

symptom.description: Optional one-line symptom description for responders.

escalation_team.description: Escalation owner (team or rotation). The skill rejects a single human's name here.
